title: Magic EverydayXP
description: Designed for team play. Be Damage, Tank or Support and be part of this great adventure
body:
**Things to know before playing**


**DROP:**
- So far the warden drops 5 diamonds, 10 emeralds and 10 resonant shards
- Special enemies can drop iron or diamond armor

**IRON AND DIAMONDS:**
- Iron and diamond Armor and Tools cannot be crafted
- These Armors and Tools can be found in the world loot

**ANVIL:**
- Armor can have a maximum of 3 special stat
- Thorns / Recoil reduction / Damage reduction
- Can be obtained with 1 diamond or 1 iron + 1 xp level on the anvil
- Iron: you have a low chance to get 1 special stat
- Iron: you can reroll the stat
- Diamond: you have a low chance to gain 1 extra special stat
- Diamond: You can also improve the special stat in the process

**SYSTEM TO REPAIR ITEMS:**
- Items can be repaired using a repair kit
- Items can also be repaired by a repair villager
- Villagers ask for emeralds to repair

**CHARMS**
- You can have 3 normal enchantments of your choice on each piece (consumes xp)
- You can reroll the enchantments for lapis lazuli (15 per attempt)

**SLOTS:**
- Slots are unlocked with Resonant Shards (1 per attempt)

**GILDED:**
- Legendary unique enchantment
- Added with 32 Gold bars
- With 8 emeralds you can reroll the enchantment

**OTHER CHANGES:**
- All charm books were removed from the game
- All golden and enchanted apples were removed from the game
- Interaction with vanilla charms table removed

**SKILL SYSTEM:**
- With the K you can see your skill tree
- With the J you can see their normal statistics
- Normal statistics will help you interact and advance in the game
- Reduced hearts: we will all start with 3 hearts (can be increased in the J)

**AI AND ENEMIES, DUNGEONS:**
- Level system by distance for enemies
- New intelligence and mechanics for vanilla monsters
- New monsters and bosses
- More than 420 types of dungeons + custom loot

**OTHER MECHANICS AND CHANGES:**
- New minerals with their armor and tool kits + Wood, Stone and Bone Armor
- Better Nether and End + New caves in the Overworld
- New mechanics for going to sleep
- Better chests and barrels + Backpack system
- Waystones and item to teleport to a specific person (spent)
